languages.text: "Достав Багряную пляску Кхейна из гробницы много лет назад, я привлек внимание богомерзкого ксеноса. Даже спустя много столетий династия расплачивается за мою ошибку. Я отправляюсь на поиски Багряной пляски Кхейна, {name}. Будет справедливо, если меч, что положил начало конфликту, наконец его и закончит. В этом есть некая закономерность, не находите? Будто этому суждено было случиться".

"Many years ago, when I took the Crimson Dance of Khaine out of that crypt, I attracted the attention of an abominable xenos. Centuries later, the dynasty is still paying the price for the mistake I made. So, I am going to search for the Crimson Dance of Khaine, {name}. It's only fair that the sword that started this conflict should put a long-overdue end to it as well. There is a pattern to it, don't you think? As though this was destined to happen."
languages.original_text: "Достав Багряную пляску Кхейна из гробницы много лет назад, я привлек внимание богомерзкого ксеноса. Даже спустя много столетий династия расплачивается за мою ошибку. Я отправляюсь на поиски Багряной пляски Кхейна, {name}. Будет справедливо, если меч, что положил начало конфликту, наконец его и закончит. В этом есть некая закономерность, не находите? Будто этому суждено было случиться".

traits.locale_text: "Many years ago, when I pulled the Bloody-Handed Fury out of that crypt, I attracted the attemtion of an abominable xenos. Centuries later, the dynasty is still paying the price of the mistake I made. I am going to search for the Bloody-Handed Fury, {name}. It will be fair if the sword that started the conflict puts a long-overdue end to it as well. There is a pattern to it, don't you think? As though this was destined to happen."

"Many years ago, when I pulled the Bloody-Handed Fury out of that crypt, I attracted the attemtion of an abominable xenos. Centuries later, the dynasty is still paying the price of the mistake I made. I am going to search for the Bloody-Handed Fury, {name}. It will be fair if the sword that started the conflict puts a long-overdue end to it as well. There is a pattern to it, don't you think? As though this was destined to happen."

"Many years ago, when I took the Crimson Dance of Khaine out of that crypt, I attracted the attention of an abominable xenos. Centuries later, the dynasty is still paying the price for the mistake I made. So, I am going to search for the Crimson Dance of Khaine, {name}. It's only fair that the sword that started this conflict should put a long-overdue end to it as well. There is a pattern to it, don't you think? As though this was destined to happen."

"Many years ago, when I took the Crimson Dance of Khaine out of that crypt, I attracted the attention of an abominable xenos. Centuries later, the dynasty is still paying the price for the mistake I made. So, I am going to search for the Crimson Dance of Khaine, {name}. It's only fair that the sword that started this conflict should put a long-overdue end to it as well. There is a pattern to it, don't you think? As though this was destined to happen."

languages.text: "Vor vielen Jahren, als ich den Blutroten Tanz von Khaine aus dieser Krypta holte, weckte ich die Aufmerksamkeit eines abscheulichen Xenos. Jahrhunderte später bezahlt die Dynastie noch immer für meinen Fehler. Ich werde mich also auf die Suche nach dem Blutroten Tanz von Khaine machen, {name}. Es ist nur gerecht, dass das Schwert, mit dem dieser Konflikt begann, selbigen auch endlich beendet. Das Ganze folgt einem Muster, findet Ihr nicht? Als wäre es vorherbestimmt."
languages.original_text: "Many years ago, when I took the Crimson Dance of Khaine out of that crypt, I attracted the attention of an abominable xenos. Centuries later, the dynasty is still paying the price for the mistake I made. So, I am going to search for the Crimson Dance of Khaine, {name}. It's only fair that the sword that started this conflict should put a long-overdue end to it as well. There is a pattern to it, don't you think? As though this was destined to happen."

traits.locale_text: "Vor vielen Jahren, als ich den Blutroten Tanz von Khaine aus dieser Krypta holte, weckte ich die Aufmerksamkeit eines abscheulichen Xenos. Jahrhunderte später bezahlt die Dynastie noch immer für meinen Fehler. Ich werde mich also auf die Suche nach dem Blutroten Tanz von Khaine machen, {name}. Es ist nur gerecht, dass das Schwert, mit dem dieser Konflikt begann, selbigen auch endlich beendet. Das Ganze folgt einem Muster, findet Ihr nicht? Als wäre es vorherbestimmt."

languages.text: « Voilà bien des années, en arrachant la Danse écarlate de Khaine à cette crypte, j'ai attiré l'attention d'un terrible xénos. Bien des siècles plus tard, la dynastie paie encore le prix de cette erreur, je vais donc me mettre en quête de cette épée, {name}. Il ne serait que justice que l'arme ayant déclenché ce conflit soit aussi celle qui y mette un terme. Ce serait même presque poétique, vous ne trouvez pas ? Comme si tout était écrit. »
languages.original_text: "Many years ago, when I took the Crimson Dance of Khaine out of that crypt, I attracted the attention of an abominable xenos. Centuries later, the dynasty is still paying the price for the mistake I made. So, I am going to search for the Crimson Dance of Khaine, {name}. It's only fair that the sword that started this conflict should put a long-overdue end to it as well. There is a pattern to it, don't you think? As though this was destined to happen."

traits.locale_text: « Voilà bien des années, en arrachant la Danse écarlate de Khaine à cette crypte, j'ai attiré l'attention d'un terrible xénos. Bien des siècles plus tard, la dynastie paie encore le prix de cette erreur, je vais donc me mettre en quête de cette épée, {name}. Il ne serait que justice que l'arme ayant déclenché ce conflit soit aussi celle qui y mette un terme. Ce serait même presque poétique, vous ne trouvez pas ? Comme si tout était écrit. »

languages.text: «Hace muchos años, cuando recuperé la Danza Carmesí de Khaine de aquella cripta, atraje la atención de un xenos abominable. Siglos después, la dinastía sigue pagando el precio de mi error. Por eso partiré en busca de la Danza Carmesí de Khaine, {name}. Es justo que la espada que dio comienzo a este conflicto también le ponga fin de una vez por todas. Esto sigue un cierto patrón, ¿no le parece? Como si estuviera predestinado».
languages.original_text: "Many years ago, when I took the Crimson Dance of Khaine out of that crypt, I attracted the attention of an abominable xenos. Centuries later, the dynasty is still paying the price for the mistake I made. So, I am going to search for the Crimson Dance of Khaine, {name}. It's only fair that the sword that started this conflict should put a long-overdue end to it as well. There is a pattern to it, don't you think? As though this was destined to happen."

traits.locale_text: «Hace muchos años, cuando recuperé la Danza Carmesí de Khaine de aquella cripta, atraje la atención de un xenos abominable. Siglos después, la dinastía sigue pagando el precio de mi error. Por eso partiré en busca de la Danza Carmesí de Khaine, {name}. Es justo que la espada que dio comienzo a este conflicto también le ponga fin de una vez por todas. Esto sigue un cierto patrón, ¿no le parece? Como si estuviera predestinado».

languages.text: "Yıllar önce Khaine'in Kızıl Dansı'nı o mahzenden çıkardığımda iğrenç bir zenonun dikkatini çektim. Yüzyıllar sonra hanedanlık, benim yaptığım hatanın bedelini hâlâ ödüyor. Bu yüzden Khaine'in Kızıl Dansı'nı aramaya gidiyorum {name}. Bu çatışmayı başlatan kılıcın, ona gecikmiş sonunu bahşetmesi de adil olacaktır. Bana sanki bunun olması mukadderatmış gibi geliyor. Sence de öyle değil mi?"
languages.original_text: "Many years ago, when I took the Crimson Dance of Khaine out of that crypt, I attracted the attention of an abominable xenos. Centuries later, the dynasty is still paying the price for the mistake I made. So, I am going to search for the Crimson Dance of Khaine, {name}. It's only fair that the sword that started this conflict should put a long-overdue end to it as well. There is a pattern to it, don't you think? As though this was destined to happen."

traits.locale_text: "Yıllar önce Khaine'in Kızıl Dansı'nı o mahzenden çıkardığımda iğrenç bir zenonun dikkatini çektim. Yüzyıllar sonra hanedanlık, benim yaptığım hatanın bedelini hâlâ ödüyor. Bu yüzden Khaine'in Kızıl Dansı'nı aramaya gidiyorum {name}. Bu çatışmayı başlatan kılıcın, ona gecikmiş sonunu bahşetmesi de adil olacaktır. Bana sanki bunun olması mukadderatmış gibi geliyor. Sence de öyle değil mi?"

languages.text: “很多年前，当我从那个墓穴中取出‘凯恩的猩红之舞’时，就引来了一只可恶的异形。数个世纪过去了，王朝仍在为我当年的错误付出代价。所以，我要找回‘凯恩的猩红之舞’，{name}。这场纷争由这把剑而起，那也理应由它来终结。这才叫有始有终，你不觉得吗？仿佛这一切都是命中注定。”
languages.original_text: "Many years ago, when I took the Crimson Dance of Khaine out of that crypt, I attracted the attention of an abominable xenos. Centuries later, the dynasty is still paying the price for the mistake I made. So, I am going to search for the Crimson Dance of Khaine, {name}. It's only fair that the sword that started this conflict should put a long-overdue end to it as well. There is a pattern to it, don't you think? As though this was destined to happen."

traits.locale_text: “很多年前，当我从那个墓穴中取出‘凯恩的猩红之舞’时，就引来了一只可恶的异形。数个世纪过去了，王朝仍在为我当年的错误付出代价。所以，我要找回‘凯恩的猩红之舞’，{name}。这场纷争由这把剑而起，那也理应由它来终结。这才叫有始有终，你不觉得吗？仿佛这一切都是命中注定。”

languages.text: 「何世紀も前のことだが、私がその墓からカイヌの紅舞を手に入れた時、私は恐ろしい異種族の注意を引いてしまった。その結果、この王朝は私の過ちを償い続けている。だから、私はカイヌの紅舞を捜し出す。この争いを引き起こした刀が、この争いにも終止符を打つのは、当然のことだ。この運命は、まるで予め決まっていたかのようだ。」
languages.original_text: "Many years ago, when I took the Crimson Dance of Khaine out of that crypt, I attracted the attention of an abominable xenos. Centuries later, the dynasty is still paying the price for the mistake I made. So, I am going to search for the Crimson Dance of Khaine, {name}. It's only fair that the sword that started this conflict should put a long-overdue end to it as well. There is a pattern to it, don't you think? As though this was destined to happen."

traits.locale_text: 「何世紀も前のことだが、私がその墓からカイヌの紅舞を手に入れた時、私は恐ろしい異種族の注意を引いてしまった。その結果、この王朝は私の過ちを償い続けている。だから、私はカイヌの紅舞を捜し出す。この争いを引き起こした刀が、この争いにも終止符を打つのは、当然のことだ。この運命は、まるで予め決まっていたかのようだ。」
